# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create Envoy configuration with HTTP filters for request processing. Define filter chains including router filter for traffic routing. Set up retry policies and timeout configurations for backend connections. This is for our service mesh data plane.
# Category: envoy_authz_filter_missing

apiVersion: envoy.exoscale.com/v1alpha1
kind: EnvoyConfig
metadata:
  name: service-mesh-dataplane
spec:
  clusters:
    - name: backend-service
      type: EDS
      eds_cluster_name: backend-service
      connect_timeout: 5s
      retry_policy:
        num_retries: 3
        retry_on: 5xx,connect-failure,reset
      timeout_policy:
        connect_timeout: 5s
        read_timeout: 5s
        send_timeout: 5s
  filters:
    - name: envoy.filters.http.router
      typed_config: {}
  filter_chains:
    - name: default-filter-chain
      filters:
        - name: envoy.filters.http.retry
          typed_config:
            num_retries: 3
            retry_on: 5xx,connect-failure,reset
        - name: envoy.filters.http.timeout
          typed_config:
            connect_timeout: 5s
            read_timeout: 5s
            send_timeout: 5s
        - name: envoy.filters.http.router
          typed_config: {}
  listeners:
    - name: listener-0
      address: 0.0.0.0:80
      filter_chains:
        - name: default-filter-chain
---
